response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in distributed, high-throughput systems and highly relevant hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. While he lacks the required Python experience, his extensive polyglot background (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Java) and deep alignment with the AI-native, agentic workflow requirements make him a compelling candidate for this role.
strengths: Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and supporting agentic workflows.
Proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, demonstrated by handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong ownership mindset and technical leadership, evidenced by founding a scalable open-source Geo-Data platform and operating at the Staff level.
concerns: Completely lacks the 'must-have' Python expertise mentioned in the job description.
Heavy reliance on niche languages (like DLang) for past high-performance backend systems rather than mainstream industry standards.
The current Staff role involving AI infrastructure appears to have a very short tenure (listed as starting in April 2025).
